plugins.noPlugins: No local Claude Code plugins with skills found. Install plugins in Claude Code to see them here.

general.apiKeyPlaceholderClearing: Stored API key will be deleted on save
general.apiKeyPlaceholderProxy: Can be empty for proxy servers
general.apiKeyClearWarning: The stored API key will be deleted from the backend on save.
general.apiKeyKeepHint: Leave empty to keep the existing API key.
general.baseUrlLabel: Base URL (optional, vLLM / Local AI, etc.)
general.proxyBypass: Bypass proxy (if proxies like Squid block API requests)
general.browserHeadlessHint: When enabled, the browser runs in the background without a visible window. Applies to the next browser session.
general.browserProxyPlaceholder: e.g., http://proxy:8080 (leave empty for no proxy)
general.browserProxyHint: Proxy server for the browser tool. Changes apply to the next browser session.
general.healthCheckHint: Tests API connectivity via the /models endpoint.
general.apiKeySecurityHint: API keys are managed by the backend only and never stored in the browser.
general.relayUrlHint: Shared server address used by both relay network and community hub. Must start with ws:// or wss://.

thinking.enableHint: When enabled, the model performs internal reasoning before responding. Unsupported models will automatically fall back to normal mode.
thinking.budgetHint: Maximum tokens the model can use for reasoning. Higher values enable deeper thinking but slower responses.

tools.maxIterationsHint: Maximum number of consecutive tool calls the AI can make in a single turn. Value between 1 and 100.

branding.companyNameHint: Displayed in the sidebar header and welcome screen.
branding.themeHint: Classic: Agent-focused UI / Organization: Company & employee metaphor
